body:
This PR contains incremental work towards #967 


<!-- Provide a clear description of the content -->

## Content: 

- [x] added a subpackage `lib/ClimaCoreSpectra` (with main implentation ported over from `ClimateMachine.jl` for now _not_ using ClimaCore's API object)
- [x] the implementation is type-safe and array type agnostic so that we could run this feature both on CPUs and GPUs (using `Array` or `CuArray`)
- [x] added and improved existing unit tests in `test/runtests.jl` and `test/gcm_visual_test.jl`
- [x] added and improved existing documentation, and linked a visual test to the `docs`
- [x] added a new integration test in `examples/gcm_remap_and_spectra.jl` that shows the entire workflow: starting from a ClimaCore cubed-sphere, defining a `Field`, remapping it using `ClimaCoreTempestRemap` and then generate the spectra with `ClimaCoreSpectra` calculator 
- [x] The plots generated and linked in the docs are tested to follow accessibility best practices for plotting (tested for color-blindness friendliness) 

- [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: lib/ClimaCoreSpectra

This PR raises the memory for the buildkite `Rising Bubble 3D hybrid invariant (ρθ)` job (OOM behavior observed in dummy PR #991 )

title: CI: add memory in buildkite job
